import string
import core.io as io

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 11 or b == 12 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn first_pos(_ s: String, _ n: Int, _ tok: String) -> Int
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws_at(s, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let stop = i
      if string.substring(s, start, stop) == tok
        return start
      end
    end
  end
  -1
end

fn count_occ(_ s: String, _ n: Int, _ tok: String) -> Int
  mut i = 0
  mut count = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws_at(s, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let stop = i
      if string.substring(s, start, stop) == tok
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
  end
  count
end

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)

mut best_token = ""
mut best_count = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws_at(s, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let stop = i
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, stop)
    if first_pos(s, n, tok) == start
      let cnt = count_occ(s, n, tok)
      if cnt > best_count
        best_count = cnt
        best_token = tok
      end

end
